page.title: Terms & Conditions | PERADA GROUP
page.description: Terms and conditions for the use of the PERADA GROUP website and services for corporate partners and visitors.

hero.headline: Terms & Conditions
hero.subheadline: Terms governing the use of the PERADA GROUP website and services.

sections.title: 1. General Terms
paragraphs: By accessing perada.net or using services provided by PERADA GROUP (PT Perkasa Adi Yuda and PT Perdana Adi Yuda), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.
If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our site or services.

sections.title: 2. Services
paragraphs: PERADA GROUP provides logistics, freight forwarding, human capital & outsourcing, import & trading (API-U), and integrated business operations support.
The scope, schedule, fees, and SLA for each service are defined in proposals, contracts, or separate cooperation agreements agreed upon with the client.

sections.title: 3. Use of the Website
paragraphs: You agree to use this site lawfully and not to:
list: Disrupt the security, integrity, or availability of the site.
Upload or distribute content that is unlawful, misleading, or harmful to others.
Use site content for commercial purposes without written permission from PERADA GROUP.
Misuse contact information or forms for spam or irrelevant activities.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on this site — including logos, text, design, and marketing materials — is protected by intellectual property laws and is owned by PERADA GROUP or its licensors.
Use, reproduction, or distribution without written permission is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Offers and Information
paragraphs: Information on the site is general in nature and may change without prior notice. Such information does not constitute a binding offer unless expressly stated in an official proposal or contract.
Cooperation decisions are based on needs analysis, operational availability, and contractual agreement between PERADA GROUP and the client.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: PERADA GROUP strives to maintain the accuracy of information on the site but does not guarantee that all content is error-free or always up to date.
To the extent permitted by law, PERADA GROUP is not liable for indirect losses arising from use of the site. Liability for service delivery is governed by the applicable cooperation agreement.

sections.title: 7. Third-Party Links
paragraphs: The site may contain links to third-party websites. PERADA GROUP is not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of those external sites.

sections.title: 8. Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Disputes that cannot be resolved amicably shall be settled through applicable legal mechanisms.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: PERADA GROUP reserves the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. The latest version will be published on this page with the corresponding update date.

sections.title: 10. Contact
paragraphs: Questions regarding these Terms & Conditions may be directed to:
